parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  transaction_id: $json.transaction_id,
  citizen_id: $json.citizen_id,
  document_number: $json.document_number,
  incident_description: $json.incident_description,
  incident_address: $json.incident_address,
  incident_category: $json.incident_category,
  municipality_code: $json.municipality_code,
  requested_scope: $json.requested_scope,
  verification_mode: $json.verification_mode,
  mock_base_url: $json.mock_base_url,
  channel: $json.channel,
  delay_ms: $json.delay_ms,
  jitter_ms: $json.jitter_ms,
  force_auth_reject: $json.force_auth_reject,
  force_invalid_identity: $json.force_invalid_identity,
  force_georef_reject: $json.force_georef_reject,
  force_policia_reject: $json.force_policia_reject,
  force_fiscalia_reject: $json.force_fiscalia_reject,
  force_notify_reject: $json.force_notify_reject
} }}
